title: paepalanthus pilosus
intro: Paepalanthus pilosus, also known as the woolly spike-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paepalanthus pilosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
